item.title: [Latent Space] The Stove Guy: Sam D'Amico Shows New AI Cooking Features on America's Most Powerful Stove at Impulse
item.description: We scallop maxed. >> Yeah. >> Thank you, Claude, for telling me the temperature. Useful for everything from deciding where air defense sites are in Iran to scallops, apparently. >> Thank you for having us, Sam. This is a really cool place. Do you want to show us around? >> Yeah, that sounds good. Yes. >> What is this? >> So, this is Impulse Cooktop. Um, it is, to my knowledge, the highest performance stove in the market. Um, >> but, uh, a couple things here that's interesting. So, one is we've, ...
